caseTitle: Maria Sandoval — Polyarthritis with hair loss
_status_notes: 3 timepoints (TP1 initial presentation, TP2 catastrophic re-presentation, TP3 synthesis + discharge management). 4 questions total. 30 minutes total time budget.
description: A 3-stage clinical case following Maria Sandoval, a 22-year-old patient with a complex multi-system illness that evolves over 14 months. Adapted from a published clinical case report.
